{{Quote|What about your courage? Think about it, Si Treemba. You were dying, and you still would not betray me. You just faced down a Hutt!|Obi-Wan Kenobi|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Si Treemba''' was an [[Arcona/Legends|Arconan]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] who was one of the first to befriend [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on the ship [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']], on their way to [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. He worked for [[Clat'Ha]] at the [[Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation]] along with many other [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and Arconans.

==Biography==
While aboard the [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']] on a trip to [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]], Si Treemba heard about the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] fight with [[Grelb]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He found the young boy lying in bed, upset at having been instigated to anger. Admiring his bravery, the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] befriended Kenobi. Soon, when hearing that supplies had been stolen, he went with Kenobi to find the missing parts. Treemba was kidnapped by the Hutt's men, but soon rescued by Kenobi.

Soon, he found himself having to make the choice of going to [[Offworld Mining Corporation]] to get the [[dactyl]] they needed, but his friendship with Obi-Wan inspired him to resist the offer and remain with his friend, prompting the other Arcona miners to follow his example. It was not long after this the ''Monument'' was attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and forced to crash-land on an unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

Eventually, they made their way off the planet and arrived on Bandomeer, where Si Treemba was assigned to survey some of the other facilities on the planet for [[Clat'Ha]], working alone, despite the close relationship between other Arconians due to the independence he had acquired from his friendship with Obi-Wan. When Obi-Wan was later captured by Offworld forces, Si Treemba was able to provide [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] with information that helped Qui-Gon find where he had been taken.
